library.description: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3: النوافذ، الإدخال، الأحداث، الصوت، والرسم الأساسي.

kind.description: استدعاءات تنفذ فعلاً، تغيّر حالة، أو تعيد نتيجة، أو تبني مورداً.

identity.name: SDL_GetCameraPermissionState
identity.titleArabic: استعلام if camera access has been approved user

summary.actualTranslationArabic: استعلام if camera access has been approved user
summary.actualMeaningArabic: استعلام if camera access has been approved user.
summary.purposeArabic: تستخدم هذه الدالة عندما تحتاج إلى استعلام if camera access has been approved user داخل التطبيق أو داخل مسار التنفيذ المرتبط بها.
summary.whyUseArabic: القيمة الحقيقية هنا هي الأثر التنفيذي الذي يحدثه الاستدعاء أو النتيجة التي يعيدها إلى التطبيق.
summary.carriedValueArabic:
القيمة العملية لهذا الاستدعاء تظهر في ناتجه ( SDL_CameraPermissionState )
Returns an SDL_CameraPermissionState
value indicating if access is granted, or SDL_CAMERA_PERMISSION_STATE_PENDING
if the decision is still pending. وفي التغيير الذي يحدثه على المورد أو الحالة المرتبطة به.
summary.sourceDescription: Query if camera access has been approved by the user.

parameters.name: camera
parameters.descriptionArabic: يمثل المعامل camera من النوع SDL_Camera * القيمة أو المورد الذي يعتمد عليه هذا الاستدعاء.
parameters.originalDescription: the opened camera device to query.

remarks:
Cameras will not function between when the device is opened by the
app and when the user permits access to the hardware. On some platforms,
this presents as a popup dialog where the user has to explicitly approve
access; on others the approval might be implicit and not alert the user
at all.

This function can be used to check the status of that approval. It
will return SDL_CAMERA_PERMISSION_STATE_PENDING
if waiting for user response, SDL_CAMERA_PERMISSION_STATE_APPROVED
if the camera is approved for use, and SDL_CAMERA_PERMISSION_STATE_DENIED
if the user denied access.

Instead of polling with this function, you can wait for a SDL_EVENT_CAMERA_DEVICE_APPROVED
(or SDL_EVENT_CAMERA_DEVICE_DENIED )
event in the standard SDL event loop, which is guaranteed to be sent
once when permission to use the camera is decided.
If a camera is declined, there's nothing to be done but call SDL_CloseCamera () to dispose of it.
details.returns:
( SDL_CameraPermissionState )
Returns an SDL_CameraPermissionState
value indicating if access is granted, or SDL_CAMERA_PERMISSION_STATE_PENDING
if the decision is still pending.
details.threadSafety: It is safe to call this function from any thread.
